_comment_Hardlinkpath: Full path to the folder where Formulaar1 creates hardlinks before Sonarr imports them

Sonarr._comment_ApiKey: Found in Sonarr > Settings > General > Security > API Key
Sonarr._comment_BasePath: Full URL to your Sonarr instance, no trailing slash

qBittorrentClient._comment_BasePath: Full URL to the qBittorrent Web UI, no trailing slash

bugsnag._comment: Optional: supply your own Bugsnag project API key for error reporting. Leave apiKey empty and enabled false to disable.
